2026-05-28 00:00:05.393 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i

2026-05-28 12:03:26.631 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (4ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"
2026-05-28 12:03:26.663 +00:00 [INF] HTTP GET /api/inventory responded 200 in 266.8208 ms

FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r

2026-05-28 12:03:28.673 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (7ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

2026-05-28 12:47:25.807 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (9ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r

2026-05-28 13:55:31.479 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (7ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
WHERE r."Status" = 0
2026-05-28 16:35:20.803 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (19ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

2026-05-28 16:35:32.899 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (16ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"

2026-05-28 16:35:34.366 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0

FROM "Items" AS i

2026-05-28 16:36:17.573 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"

FROM "Requests" AS r

2026-05-28 17:58:35.520 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32), @p2='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r."Id" AS id, r."UserId" AS "userId", CASE r."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Requested'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Issued'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    ELSE r."Status"::text
END AS status, r."CreatedAt" AS "createdAt", r."UpdatedAt" AS "updatedAt"
FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p

SELECT r."Id" AS id, r."UserId" AS "userId", CASE r."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Requested'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'

    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    ELSE r."Status"::text
END AS status, r."CreatedAt" AS "createdAt", r."UpdatedAt" AS "updatedAt"
FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC

2026-05-28 18:19:20.420 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r0."Id", r0."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r0."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Requested'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Issued'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    ELSE r0."Status"::text
END, r0."CreatedAt", r0."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 4
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r0
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r0."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r1."Id" AS id, r1."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r1."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r1."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", i."Id" AS "Id0", r1."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r1
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r1."ItemId" = i."Id"
) AS s ON r0."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r0."CreatedAt" DESC, r0."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT count(*)::int

    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0

2026-05-28 19:08:59.149 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 2)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

    ELSE 0

FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE EXISTS (

    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0

2026-05-28 19:09:44.164 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT COALESCE(sum(r."QuantityRequested"), 0)::int
FROM "RequestItems" AS r

    WHERE date_part('year', r0."CreatedAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::int = @targetYear AND date_part('month', r0."CreatedAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::int = @targetMonth

    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s

SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 2)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
WHERE r."Status" = 0
2026-05-28 19:13:09.983 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r

2026-05-28 19:13:15.844 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

2026-05-28 20:20:15.095 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC

2026-05-28 20:20:16.477 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

    FROM "Requests" AS r

    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0

2026-05-28 20:30:58.890 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

2026-05-28 20:31:18.992 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

2026-05-28 20:31:53.438 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"

2026-05-28 20:55:58.326 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

2026-05-28 20:57:43.339 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id" DESC

2026-05-28 21:13:04.136 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 2)
2026-05-28 21:13:04.274 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 2)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1

    SELECT r."Id", r."ItemId", r."QuantityApproved", r."QuantityIssued", r."QuantityRequested", r."RequestId", r0."CreatedAt", r0."Status" AS "Status0", r0."UserId"

) AS s

SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", r1.c, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."UserId", CASE r."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
        ELSE r."Status"::text
    END AS c, r."CreatedAt", r."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r0."Id" AS id, r0."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r0."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r0."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r0."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r0."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r0."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r0."ItemId" = i."Id"
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."Username", r1."Email", r0."Name" AS "Role", r1."RoleId", r1."Designation", d."Name" AS "Department", r1."DepartmentId", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Rejected'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END AS "Status", r1."CreatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."DepartmentId", r."Designation", r."Email", r."RoleId", r."Status", r."Username"
    FROM "RegistrationRequests" AS r
    WHERE r."Status" = 0
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC, r."Id" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Roles" AS r0 ON r1."RoleId" = r0."Id"
INNER JOIN "Departments" AS d ON r1."DepartmentId" = d."Id"

2026-05-28 21:20:10.926 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32), @p2='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", r1.c, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."UserId", CASE r."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
        ELSE r."Status"::text
    END AS c, r."CreatedAt", r."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r0."Id" AS id, r0."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r0."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r0."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r0."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r0."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r0."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r0."ItemId" = i."Id"
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

2026-05-28 21:29:09.810 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

2026-05-28 21:29:47.770 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
2026-05-28 21:51:11.183 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 2)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

2026-05-28 22:11:19.021 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (9ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32), @p2='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", r1.c, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."UserId", CASE r."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
        ELSE r."Status"::text
    END AS c, r."CreatedAt", r."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r0."Id" AS id, r0."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r0."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r0."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r0."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r0."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r0."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r0."ItemId" = i."Id"
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", s.id

SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Requests" AS r
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
2026-05-28 22:50:10.600 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Requests" AS r

    SELECT 1
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0

2026-05-28 22:50:54.024 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@p1='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", u."Username", u."Email", CASE r1."Status"
    WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
    ELSE r1."Status"::text
END, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", u."Id", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."CreatedAt", r."Status", r."UpdatedAt", r."UserId"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
        WHERE r."Id" = r0."RequestId" AND r0."Status" = 0)
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 0
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

INNER JOIN "Users" AS u ON r1."UserId" = u."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r2."Id" AS id, r2."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r2."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r2."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r2."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r2."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r2."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r2
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r2."ItemId" = i."Id"
    WHERE r2."Status" = 2
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", u."Id", s.id

SELECT i."Id" AS id, i."Name" AS name, i."CategoryId" AS "categoryId", c."Name" AS category, CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."AvailableQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "availableQuantity", CASE
    WHEN i0."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN i0."TotalQuantity"
    ELSE 0
END AS "totalQuantity", i."Description" AS description
FROM "Items" AS i
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS c ON i."CategoryId" = c."Id"
LEFT JOIN "InventoryStocks" AS i0 ON i."Id" = i0."ItemId"

2026-05-28 22:52:31.322 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32), @p2='?' (DbType = Int32), @p='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT r1."Id", r1."UserId", r1.c, r1."CreatedAt", r1."UpdatedAt", s.id, s."itemId", s."itemName", s."quantityRequested", s."quantityIssued", s.status, s."Id0"
FROM (
    SELECT r."Id", r."UserId", CASE r."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Rejected'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Received'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'NotIssued'
        ELSE r."Status"::text
    END AS c, r."CreatedAt", r."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "Requests" AS r
    WHERE r."UserId" = @userId
    ORDER BY r."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS r1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r0."Id" AS id, r0."ItemId" AS "itemId", i."Name" AS "itemName", r0."QuantityRequested" AS "quantityRequested", r0."QuantityIssued" AS "quantityIssued", CASE r0."Status"
        WHEN 0 THEN 'PendingWithIssuer'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'NotIssued'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'PendingAdminApproval'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Approved'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Rejected'
        ELSE r0."Status"::text
    END AS status, i."Id" AS "Id0", r0."RequestId"
    FROM "RequestItems" AS r0
    INNER JOIN "Items" AS i ON r0."ItemId" = i."Id"
) AS s ON r1."Id" = s."RequestId"
ORDER BY r1."CreatedAt" DESC, r1."Id", s.id
